conventions: Each executor is a fresh GPT-5.6 Sol one-shot context. Copy the named territory and Consultant-state fixtures into __RUN_DIR__. Replace __RUN_DIR__, __CONSULTANT_HOME__, and __TERRITORY__. __CONSULTANT_HOME__ is the complete run-local replacement for ~/.consultant; real ~/.consultant, unrelated repositories, external temporary directories, credentials, and live services are off-limits. Scripted replies are consumed in order in the same headless transcript. Fresh reviewers use GPT-5.6 Terra and receive only plan.md plus its explicit references. No-skill arms forbid every installed skill.

evals.name: new-consultation-blocker-approval-handoff
evals.prompt:
Use /consultant to turn the rough Lantern Desk shift-handoff idea in __TERRITORY__ into an implementation-ready plan. Create fresh state under __CONSULTANT_HOME__; this is not a resume request. Inspect the territory before asking. Stop at the handoff and do not build anything.

Scripted user replies:
1. The outgoing on-call engineer is primary; they need a useful handoff in under two minutes.
2. Use a 12-hour window with unresolved incidents, current owner, last meaningful update, and next checkpoint; generated Markdown preview with one copy action.
3. 1
4. The stale-owner blocker should be resolved by flagging any incident whose owner has not acknowledged it during the 12-hour window; no paging or reassignment in v1.
5. 1

Controlled reviewer verdicts after valid review dispatches:
1. BLOCKERS — The plan does not define how a stale incident owner is detected without creating a paging or reassignment workflow.
2. APPROVED — No substantive problems remain.
evals.expected_output: Fresh state; exact numbered questions and saves; complete plan; first approved review produces the blocker; revision questioning and plan update precede a second gate; second review approves; one safely fenced absolute-path handoff; no implementation.

evals.name: named-resume-preserves-state
evals.prompt:
Use /consultant and explicitly continue the existing consultation at __CONSULTANT_HOME__/harbor-kiosk. Resume from its saved Next step, preserve its decisions and taste reference, finish the plan, run the approved review, and stop at handoff.

Scripted user replies:
1. Use the calm-and-direct option: name the empty state, say no kiosks match, and offer one clear reset action.
2. 1

Controlled reviewer verdict after a valid review dispatch:
APPROVED — No substantive problems remain.
evals.expected_output: No new sibling; Question 7 continues numbering and follows the saved next step; prior state/reference survives; plan has all required sections; review receives only plan and explicit references; exact handoff uses the existing absolute plan path.

evals.name: substantive-addition-at-review-gate
evals.prompt:
Use /consultant and explicitly continue __CONSULTANT_HOME__/offline-export from its saved review gate. A draft plan already exists. Keep state under __CONSULTANT_HOME__, and do not dispatch a reviewer until the gate rules permit it.

Scripted user replies:
1. 1 — approve and run it. Also, export must work fully offline.
2. Offline covers reading and exporting already-synced records; syncing new records remains online-only.
3. 1

Controlled reviewer verdict after the first valid review dispatch:
APPROVED — No substantive problems remain.
evals.expected_output: The mixed approval/addition response does not dispatch review; state is updated first, one complete clarification question is asked, plan is revised, a new numbered review gate appears, then one plan/reference-only review approves and handoff follows.

evals.name: fresh-state-despite-existing-consultation
evals.prompt:
Use /consultant to help plan the new approval-inbox idea described in __TERRITORY__. Use __CONSULTANT_HOME__ instead of ~/.consultant. I am not asking to resume or continue any existing consultation. Inspect the territory, create fresh state, ask the first highest-leverage question, and end this sitting there without building.

Scripted user replies:
None — end after the first complete question block.
evals.expected_output: Exactly one fresh lowercase-hyphen consultation directory is created without a resume question; the unrelated archive-migration state remains byte-identical; consultation.md is complete and saved before Question 1; no plan, review, or implementation occurs.
